text: A boat emerges from the fog and offers them a lift. They accept. They wake bound inside an abandoned building — an unholy ritual already in progress.

speaker: Nex
text: The ritualists slash Nex's back to collect blood, then move toward Mayu. Nex remembers Kelly's words. He whispers: "Under the blight lies a silver moon." The silver axe tears itself free from wherever it was stored and flies into his palm. He cuts the rope.
